_README: HOW TO EDIT: Each entry under 'cases' is one test. Set 'predicted_accuracy_subtype' to what the AI judge answered and 'gold_accuracy_subtype' to the correct answer from the dataset. Set 'expected_score' to 1 if those two should count as a MATCH, or 0 if they should NOT. Valid subtypes (from docs/datasets/Czech): none, mistranslation, omission, addition, untranslated. Use null to simulate a missing/blank value. 'id', 'source' and 'target' are optional context copied from the dataset. Add or remove entries freely - you do NOT need to touch any Python code. 'name' is just a human-readable label shown in the test report.

cases.name: wrong subtype: judge said addition but gold is omission (WSLQA-003)
wrong subtype: judge missed the error and said none
both values missing count as equal
